## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` (passes)
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint:workflows` (passes)
- [ ] New workflow uses a template from `templates/`
- [ ] New workflow is linked in `README.md` in the correct section
- [ ] `tested` field in frontmatter is accurate
- [ ] Sources section has at least one link to official docs
